item.title: Don't display archived work orders in calendar

output: RUN_NEEDS_INPUT: Edit permission for `app/Http/Controllers/Work/WorkController.php` is being denied. The implementation is a single one-line change (add `->notArchived()` to the `getWorkOrders()` query at line 312-314) plus a feature test. Please grant write permission to this file (and to `tests/Feature/Work/WorkControllerCalendarTest.php` for the new test) so I can apply the change per the plan in `docs/plans/hide-archived-work-orders-from-calendar.md`.
